day1.title: Responsible AI with GitHub Copilot
objectives: Understand Microsoft's six principles of Responsible AI
Recognize AI risks and mitigation strategies
Apply responsible AI practices to code generation
section_titles: Responsible AI Practice: Fair Student Support Priorities

exercise.title: Responsible AI review for school support prioritization
steps: Generate a support priority helper using Copilot.
Add fairness and transparency checks.
Remove sensitive data from logs.
Write tests for equivalent-priority scenarios.
Document governance decisions in README.

expected_outcomes: A fair and explainable prioritization helper.
Confidence applying Responsible AI in daily development.

day2.title: Introduction to GitHub Copilot
objectives: Describe GitHub Copilot capabilities and features
Master all interaction modes
Setup and configure Copilot in your IDE
section_titles: GitHub Copilot — Your AI Pair Programmer
Practice with Copilot: Student and Class Onboarding

exercise.title: Implement student and class onboarding APIs with Copilot
steps: Scaffold Student and Class schemas with inline suggestions.
Generate POST /students and POST /classes handlers using inline chat.
Add duplicate handling and structured errors with Copilot Chat.
Generate tests for success, invalid payload, and duplicates.
Refine code readability and docs before final review.

expected_outcomes: Better use of Copilot interaction modes.

day3.title: Introduction to prompt engineering with GitHub Copilot
objectives: Master the 4S method for effective prompts
Understand learning strategies and process flow
Apply best practices for quality suggestions
section_titles: Prompt Engineering Practice: Inventory Request API

exercise.title: Improve inventory endpoint generation with 4S prompts
steps: Generate endpoint with a weak prompt and note gaps.
Rewrite prompt with 4S and explicit validation rules.
Use one-shot/few-shot examples to align style.
Generate edge-case tests using Copilot.
Save final prompt template for team reuse.

expected_outcomes: Clear quality gain from stronger prompts.
Reusable prompt template for API work.
Lower defect rate through explicit constraints.

day4.title: Introduction to Copilot Spaces
objectives: Understand Copilot Spaces and when to use them
Create and manage Spaces with proper governance
Apply context grounding techniques
section_titles: Prompting in Spaces for Reliable Outputs
Exercise: Spaces for School Operations Knowledge

exercise.title: Build a school-operations Copilot Space
steps: Create a Space for school operations API guidance.
Attach key policy documents.
Define response format and citation rules.
Test prompts for attendance and grading scenarios.
Remove low-signal files if answers are generic.

day5.title: Using advanced GitHub Copilot features
objectives: Master inline chat, slash commands, and agents
Apply advanced workflows to route/test/docs
Understand implicit prompts and shortcuts
section_titles: Advanced Workflow Practice: Inventory Update Route, Tests, and Docs

exercise.title: Implement inventory stock update workflow with Copilot
steps: Generate POST /stock-updates with inline chat.
Use /tests to create success and failure test cases.
Add idempotency checks for repeated updateId.
Use agent mode to write README endpoint docs.
Refactor for clean controller-service separation.

expected_outcomes: Complete stock update workflow with tests and docs.
Practical use of inline chat, slash commands, and agents.

day6.title: GitHub Copilot Across Environments
objectives: Compare Copilot across IDE, Chat, GitHub.com, and CLI
Master file references, slash commands, and agents
Understand CLI workflows and GitHub.com integration

exercise.title: Resolve inventory sync incident across Copilot environments
steps: Patch sync mapping logic with IDE suggestions.
Use Chat with #file references to explain defect and test strategy.
Use GitHub.com Copilot to review PR risks before merge.
Use CLI Copilot to generate backfill and verification commands.
Write a short incident summary and follow-up actions.

expected_outcomes: Tested sync fix with safe deployment guidance.
Strong practical use of all Copilot environments.
